system.description: This ruby has been set in a series of weapons for the last three centuries. One estimate was that the gem had participated in upwards of a thousand deaths. Legend suggests that the ruby can hold a single ghost, surviving the destruction of the body, bound to the gem until it chooses another guest.
system.additional_info: While the gemstone is priceless because of its unnatural clarity, it is also possible that an important ghost might be inside, and might choose to speak to a Whisper or a blood relative.
